rationale.R1.6: The agent performed a thorough copy-edit, reducing redundancy and tightening the text while preserving all substantive facts.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainties regarding model versions and specific figures, showing consideration of potential issues.
rationale.RX.3: The revised version adheres strictly to the original scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; the output is clean and accurate.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes are explained, minor edits lack detailed traceability.
